description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Subsync_CI that runs on every push. Use a matrix job that runs on macos-latest, ubuntu-latest, and windows-2016 with multiple Python versions (2.7.x, 3.5.x, 3.6.x, 3.7.x). In each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies from requirements.txt and requirements-dev.txt, lint the code with flake8, and run tests with pytest.
